violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of behind the soda machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024
The refuse area was observed with an accumulation of debris. Refuse area must be kept maintained New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024
The non-food contact surfaces behind the soda machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2023

The back room area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris including pest droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The side of the building has an accumulation of trash and debris the outside of facilities shall be cleaned as often as needed to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2023
